PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CASTANEDA, FLABIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAING, CHUANG SUED AS TANG, CHUANG $8,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,625.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF.
